notes: Pieces is now the sole memory backend. QuickCapture widget removed from home page. FullscreenCell Commit button removed. Settings stripped of density/frames/gestures/prediction/auto-commit/memory rows. Cache busters bumped to force browser refresh.

Phase 2 of bedrock repopulation — 28 client boxes translated to people/*.json with kind:lead. Full enrichment + lead sub-object + comms summary captured.

Phase 5 of bedrock repopulation — top 30 venues by total deal value. Tiered: 10 tier_1 / 10 tier_2 / 10 tier_3. Cross-referenced Master Venue Index with Lead Venue Accounts (68) for Close enrichment.

Markdown rendering bug fixed: .ix-qa-text inherits white-space:pre-wrap which broke block-level markdown rendering once .md class was added — overridden to white-space:normal for .md.ix-qa-text. Markdown component hardened against marked v14 async path. Cache busters bumped: styles.css v75→v76, components.jsx v58→v59.

Phase A — created intelligence/ skeleton with 24 leaf domains (READMEs + .gitkeep), wrote MANIFEST.md mapping all 24 scripts. Phase B pilot — conversation intelligence rewritten + 30-day sweep + Analytics page wired with KPI tiles, sparkline, channel-mix bars, most-active-leads, full-narrative panel. Bedrock-fed (MissionControl.conversationIntelligence), AI-prompt-fed (BEDROCK STRUCTURED TRUTH section).
Source channel intelligence snapshot populated from 666 Close CRM opportunities (30-day window). 621 leads, 35 sources, 6 owners. Written by analytics_source_channels.py.

Seller performance + pipeline health sweep: 666 opps, 79 won, 273 active, pipeline $496.5k, won $241.2k, median close 27.3d, 6 owners, 27 pipeline stages. New script: Onboard Scripts/analytics_seller_performance.py (Close API, opportunity-first). UI: AnalyticsScreen stat strip +pipeline tile, +Pipeline Funnel tab, owners tab enriched with pipeline$/avg deal/median close/top stages. Bedrock registered: indexes/index.json analytics[]. Cache-bust: screens v70.

Upcoming events registry sweep: 4,569 opps / 4,198 leads / 409 upcoming events in 180d window. $737.8k booked, 25,696 total guests. June peak: 102 events $203k. 236 weddings, 27 graduations, 20 birthdays. New script: analytics_upcoming_events.py (Close API, 4 event custom fields). UI: AnalyticsScreen 6th stat tile, 6th tab (Upcoming Events) with monthly bars + type breakdown + full event timeline. Bedrock registered. Cache-bust: screens v71.

Win/loss conversion intelligence sweep: 4,569 opps, 553 won, 12.1% overall win rate, $1.4M won value, 10 conversion dimensions. Registered in indexes/index.json. Win/Loss tab added to AnalyticsScreen (screens.jsx v73), stat strip expanded to 7 tiles.

Revenue & growth intelligence sweep: 8,514 opps over 730d, 791 won, $1.7M total revenue, YoY +3.3%, median deal $2.0k, P75 $4.1k, top-20% deals = 52.4% of revenue. Revenue & Growth tab added to AnalyticsScreen (screens.jsx v74), stat strip expanded to 8 tiles with YoY growth indicator.

Added full analytics interactivity layer: AnalyticsContextMenu + AnalyticsToast components, right-click context menus on source bars/table rows/owner rows/event-type rows/guest-bucket rows/stage-of-death rows/revenue month bars, spotlight system (highlights one segment across all charts), ViewToggle (sources: chart|table, winloss: rates|counts, revenue: monthly|cumulative), clipboard copy with toast confirmation, Open in Close CRM action, cross-tab navigation from context menus, spotlight badge with dismiss X. Screens v74→v75.
Booking lead time sweep: 525 future bookings, median 51d, 38.3% last-minute. Fixed EVENT_DT_F field ID (was wrong in v1). Weddings median 168d, corporate 4d.
Cohort conversion analysis: 32 monthly cohorts, 4.9% avg 90d rate, 5.6% avg 1yr. expo_event 0% conversion (484 leads). Best: 2024-02 at 21.4% 90d.
Added Lead Time tab + Cohort Analysis tab + Auto-Insights panel to AnalyticsScreen. 10 tabs total. bookingLT + cohortData state + 7-fetch Promise.all. Cache-buster → v78.

Analytics styling overhaul: (1) Added AIcon component (inline SVG via window.icon design-deck system). (2) AnalyticsContextMenu + AnalyticsToast updated — font var(--mono)→var(--sans), icons render via AIcon instead of emoji characters. (3) Font fix: --mono: var(--font-body) override at analytics wrapper level so all UI labels use IBM Plex Sans site-wide. (4) All emoji icon: values replaced with design-deck icon names (eye/write/link/chart/diff/cal/fire/warn/clock/sparkles/wave/bolt). (5) Inline spotlight indicators {isSpot && 🔦} → AIcon eye. (6) Intel Signals ✦ header → AIcon sparkles. (7) Cohort Top-5 header 🏆 → AIcon sparkles. (8) Spotlight badge 🔦 → AIcon eye. (9) Urgency tile icons now render via AIcon. (10) Revenue insight uses revIcon name instead of dir arrow. (11) Context menus added to all 8 stat strip tiles (copy + go-to-tab). (12) Context menus added to compact All Sources list items. (13) Venue page 🔥 ENRICH NOW → text. Cache-bust: screens v84→v85.

section_added: PRIME DIRECTIVE — Ledger discipline above all else
notes: Elevated ledger discipline to the prime directive at the top of CLAUDE.md. Block contains: principle statement, read-list of 6 ledgers to consult before any meaningful action, update-list of 9 ledgers/sites to touch in the same unit of work as a change, cardinal-sin framing about ledger drift, and the hard rule 'no time for ledgers means no time for the change.' Six operational disciplines below it preserved unchanged. Triggered by Jake explicit ask 2026-04-30: 'make sure you are updating those ledgers like my life depends on it.' This is the Cowork-tab Instructions surface — primary onboarding for every cold-starting Claude in this repo.

Connections Ledger landed — first domain-tier ledger under DEC-2026-04-29-013. 14 active + 2 planned + 3 not-in-use services, all evidence-checked against server.py + .env + connectors.js + docs/connectors.md. No raw secrets. Twilio (missed by draft) registered. Slack token-format issue flagged. Companion files: CONNECTIONS.json, VISUALS/connections_dependency_map.mmd.
PROB-009 (optional connections need verification) closed. CONNECTIONS.md §4 satisfies the single close-criterion: each service is now active/optional/planned/not-in-use with grep evidence.
